# Tasks

### Task 1: Set up project structure

Set up the initial project with FastAPI and PostgreSQL.

Implements FR-01, FR-02.

### Task 2: Implement registration endpoint

Create POST /api/auth/register with email validation.

Implements FR-01. Depends on task 1.

### Task 3: Implement login endpoint

Create POST /api/auth/login with JWT token generation.

Implements FR-02. Depends on task 1.

### Task 4: Implement password reset

Create POST /api/auth/reset-password with email notification.

Implements FR-03. Depends on task 2.
